var.name: rli
var.description: Lifted index

var.name: rki
var.description: K index

var.name: rwi
var.description: Showalter index

var.name: cape
var.description: Most Unstable Convective available potential energy

var.name: cin
var.description: Most Unstable Convective inhibition

var.name: mlcape
var.description: Mixed Layer Convective available potential energy

var.name: mlcin
var.description: Mixed Layer Convective inhibition

var.name: lcl
var.description: Lifted condensation level

var.name: lfc
var.description: Level of free convection

var.name: srh_0_1km
var.description: Storm relative helicity, 0-1 km AGL

var.name: srh_0_3km
var.description: Storm relative helicity, 0-3 km AGL

var.name: uzonal_surface
var.description: Zonal wind component at midpoint of lowest model layer

var.name: uzonal_1km
var.description: Zonal wind component at 1 km AGL

var.name: uzonal_6km
var.description: Zonal wind component at 6 km AGL

var.name: umeridional_surface
var.description: Meridional wind component at midpoint of lowest model layer

var.name: umeridional_1km
var.description: Meridional wind component at 1 km AGL

var.name: umeridional_6km
var.description: Meridional wind component at 6 km AGL

var.name: temperature_surface
var.description: Temperature at midpoint of lowest model layer

var.name: dewpoint_surface
var.description: Dewpoint temperature at midpoint of lowest model layer

var.name: updraft_helicity_max
var.description: Maximum updraft helicity since last output

var.name: w_velocity_max
var.description: Maximum column w velocity since last output

var.name: wind_speed_level1_max
var.description: Maximum wind speed in lowest model level since last output
